title: Kenyan Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew from Kenya, featuring tender lamb and aromatic spices. Serve with a side of crusty bread or over rice for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and sauté the onion, garlic, and ginger until the onion is translucent.
Add the tomatoes, curry powder, cumin, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the coconut milk, lamb shoulder, and enough water to cover the lamb. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
